titleStmt.title: SII 23.420: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 420. (A.R. No. 420 of 1907.) Gūḍalūr, Dindugal Taluk, Madurai District Aḷagiri Perumāḷ temple—on a slab set up in the premises Kulaśēkharapperumāḷ: Śaka 1591, Kollam 844, Kīlaka, Āvaṇi 9, Sunday śu. 12, Uttirāḍam (A.D. 1668, August 9)

summary.p: This registers an endowment of land at Gūḍalūr by the king for worship in the temples of Maṅgalādēviyammaṉ, Aḻagarkōyil Vanmīkanāthasvāmi, Śāstā at Periyāṟu with Brāhmaṇa-feeding, Śāstā at Pūṉaiyāṟu, Bhagavati at Naḍaikkal and for a feeding house at Ettumānallūr exclusive of the land given to one Neḍumākkal Paṇikkar for his maintenance. Towards the end of the inscription are incised the following figures: two strung bows, a mace, a sheaf cutter, a chakra, a lamp-stand, a man with tufted hair bending towards it and holding a kamaṇḍalu by the right hand and an umbrella by the left.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cakāttam 1000 5 100 9 10 1- kku mel cellā
niṉṟa kollam 8 100 4 10 4 varuṣam kila
ka varuṣam Āvaṇi mātam 9 tiyati nāyaṟṟu
kkiḷamaiyum pūṟuvapakkattut tuvā
teciyum Uttirāṭa naṭcettiramum
cupayoka cupakaraṇamum peṟ
ṟa nāḻil nayiṉār kulacekarap
perumāḷ kūṭalūril nāṉ
ṅkelkaikkuḷpaṭṭa nilattil
muṭukkuvayal tirttiyāvatu va
ṟaṭṭāttukku merkku raṅkāl ne
ṟ curuḷiyāttukku pokiṟa kiḷmelppā
taikku vaṭakku kampattup pokiṟa vāy
kkālukku kiḷakku muṭukkuvayal El
lai kallukkum meṟpaṭi kiḷak
koṭiya vāykkālukkum te
ṟku Iṉṉāṉṅku Atirtti
kkuḷpaṭṭa nilattil neṭu
mākkalp paṇikkaṟku viṭṭa
nilam 2 100ttukku vayal jha
6m poka nikki yuṇṭā
ṉa nilattil maṅkalāte
viyammaṉ pūcaikku viṭṭa ni
lam 10 5ḷ pa Aḻakarko
yilukku viṭṭa nilam 6 100�
vaṉmikaṉātacuvāmikku vi
ṭṭa nilam 5 100pa periyāṟṟu
c cāttāviṉ pūcaikku vi
ṭṭa nilam 1000 5 100pa meṟpaṭi koyi
l pirāmaṇa pocaṉattukku viṭṭa
nilam 2 1000pa pūṉaiyāṟṟu cāttā
viṉ kovilukku viṭṭa nilam 2 1000 5 100
pa naṭaikkal pakavatikku viṭṭa nila
m 5 1000pa Ettumānallūrūṭṭu
viṭṭa nilam 5 1000 Āka kovil
nilattukkum pirāmaṇapocaṉattu
kkum Uḷḷiṭṭu poka viṭṭa nilam
2 10000pa Inta nilam Irunūṟṟitattinila
m cattirātittar varaikkum na
ṭṭummāvu kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭom
yintappaṭi naṭakkiṟavi
ṭattile yinta nilattukku yātā
moruttar taṭaiyiṭai
ceytate yuṇṭāṉāl
Āyavarkaḷ keṅkaik ka
raiyil kārāmpacuvaiyum
mātā pitāvaiyum ko
ṉṟa toṣattile povā
rākavum Intappaṭi perumāḷ
kovilkkallile ve
ṭṭi Irukkutu Eṉṟaṟiyavum
Ippaṭikku
māḷaiyāḷam tampurānār .
Digital edition of SII 23.420 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
